description_long: This is a modern outdoor bench featuring a sturdy metal frame and horizontal wooden slats for both the seat and backrest. The bench has a minimalist design, with two rectangular metal supports on either end that serve as legs and provide stability. The seat consists of three evenly spaced wooden planks, while the backrest is made up of two wider wooden slats, offering comfortable support for users. The metal frame is painted a dark color, contrasting with the medium brown wood, and the overall construction suggests durability for public or park use. There are no armrests, giving the bench a clean, open appearance and allowing seating from either side. The materials and design indicate it is well-suited for outdoor urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas.
description: A modern outdoor bench with a dark metal frame and horizontal brown wooden slats for the seat and backrest, designed for durability and comfort in public spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden slats and the rectangular metal leg structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three seat slats and two wide backrest slats, with open sides and no armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the structure and materials seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the backrest slats and the supporting metal frame, with both legs visible.
attribute_leg_design: rectangular metal supports on each end
